name: Roger
description:
A hunter who walks the line between good and evil.

Roger was once a human being. During a battle with the werewolf White Fang, he was killed by White Fang's sharp teeth and resurrected as a half human, half werewolf. Roger, who had been reborn, vowed to take revenge and eradicate the threat of the werewolves from this world.
Ignoring the villagers' warnings, Roger decided to settle right by the edge of the Black Forest, a mere few miles east of the Megalith Wastelands. His countless years in the imperial army had made him a man of strong resolve... and perhaps too stubborn for his own good. Regardless, now that his days as a soldier had passed, he was determined to hunt in the dark woodlands and live off of its bounty.

Character from Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
creator: Lilith0000
